tiktok.caption: 51% of workers pick the wrong health plan every year — and it costs them $2,100 they'll never get back

youtube_short.title: Wrong Health Plan Costs You $2,100/Year
title_alternatives: The Open Enrollment Mistake 51% of Workers Make
Why Your Health Insurance Is Probably Wrong (And Expensive)
youtube_short.description:
Every open enrollment, 51% of workers just click re-enroll without doing the math — and it quietly costs them over $2,100 a year. The culprit is one word: deductible. It scares people away from high-deductible plans even when the numbers clearly win. Pair an HDHP with an HSA — the only triple tax-free account in existence — and invest the premium difference. Over 10 years, a healthy worker builds $34,000 instead of burning it on premiums. Run the real math this year: total premiums plus average out-of-pocket, not just the monthly cost. #healthinsurance #openenrollment #HSA #personalfinance #moneytips

Follow for a new money trap exposed every day.

hook_line: 51% of workers pick the wrong health plan every year
